name: Glitch-Stalkers
function: Hunt through angles (120°+ Euclidean). Clean logic-exploits.

visual_profile.appearance: Wolves made of shattered glass and electric spark

sensory_signature.sound: Clock accelerating to supersonic tick (temporal pressure)

hunting_logic.entry_method: Slide through geometric fractures into linear time
hunting_logic.portal_creation: Modern architecture with sharp 90° corners creates unintentional summoning glyphs

movement_pattern.characteristic: When appearing in peripheral vision, they've already closed distance non-linearly
movement_pattern.hunting_loop: Persistent hunting across all sub-planes until linear time resumed

threat_assessment: Persistent hunting loop across all sub-planes until linear time resumed. Cannot perceive curves.
sources: Frank Belknap Long: Hounds of Tindalos
tactical_notes: They only hunt the angles you leave behind. Modern skyscrapers are unintentional portals.
